channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Packaging, 5th April
item.description:
Packaging left in alleyway for over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Bridge Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canisters on road, 5th April
item.description:
On Sunday April 5th I noticed 6 Nitrous oxide gas canisters discarded in the road. They are flammable and should not be left in sunlight. Please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 5th April
item.description:
Slide and kids toys dumped Also a wheel barrow
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, St Paul's Wood Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kingsway Road sign has come off, 5th April
item.description:
Road sign has come off, not sure how long it has been like this, spotted per the picture today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty cardboard boxes, plastic food tray and other wind swept rubbish between 21 to 41 Amhurst Road. Including green spaces., 5th April
item.description:
Wind swept rubbish.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red barriers dumped here yesterday, 5th April
item.description:
These red barriers were dumped here yesterday. They are blocking the pavement so are a trip hazard and could be pushed onto the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 large potholes, 5th April
item.description:
There are four large potholes which are deep and dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Cat Hill, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lawn on green requires mowing, 5th April
item.description:
Lawn on green requires mowing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thoughtlessly parked Lime bikes, 5th April
item.description:
4

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78-80, Wapping Lane, Wapping, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Random detritus dumped in alley, 5th April
item.description:
Old clothes, shopping trolley and other rubbish dumped in alleyway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rat infested fly tipping dump, 5th April
item.description:
A large dump of fly tipped rubbish full of rats
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter on pavement, 5th April
item.description:
This stretch of Parish Lane has loads of litter (bottles, cardboard boxes etc) along the pavements. Could it get a clean-up please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cookham Road, 5th April
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cookham Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly tipping dump., 5th April
item.description:
There is a large fly tipped dumped. It has gas canisters and old electronics and building materials. It also seems infested with rats and other pests.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambrooke Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Infront of the Athelstan Gardens bin shed, 5th April
item.description:
We woke up this morning to many bags tiles and other bulding waste, plus a large box which clearly still has the persons address written on the block. The person lives several roads away from here. We want this person fined as this is an ongoing problem, with neighbouring roads and even further afield coming into our area to dump their waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: An abandoned car in public car parking, 5th April
item.description:
Car registration number is CK08AWM this car has not been moved from September 2025 and this full loaded with rubbish or old belongings which is higher fire risk hazard.Taking a residential parking space and putting other car in fire risk.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St John Fisher Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rug and other furnishings dumped, 5th April
item.description:
Random househood rubbish dumped by the sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambrooke Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped clothes rack, 5th April
item.description:
Metal clothes dryer dumped behind the big houses backing onto Hardings Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bins, 5th April
item.description:
The brown bins don’t belong to anyone and have been left on the street. The bins don’t belong to residents in Dukes Avenue; there is fly tipping around the bins. This has been reported numerous times but not resolved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dukes Avenue, Stifford Clays, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green telephone cabinet broken off it's foundation, 5th April
item.description:
It looks like it's been hit by a car
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
